title: Derived runtime policy and minimal operator config
summary: Introduce an additive derived runtime policy layer that computes effective sizing/caps/thresholds and entry gating from runtime state (wallet snapshot, deployable, accounting guard state, zombie pressure) while keeping existing env-backed Settings as compatibility defaults. Add operator intent via RISK_MODE and surface derived policy fields in entry_capacity_mode_summary for dashboard visibility. Core safety invariants (T-013/T-014/T-015) remain intact.
why_safe: Derived policy is additive and conservative: it tightens caps or shrinks size under wallet/zombie pressure but does not loosen existing safety checks.
Existing Settings env vars remain supported as defaults; runtime policy only influences entry sizing/cap/threshold decisions.
Accounting safety guard and reconciliation remain unchanged and still gate entries.
commit_message: Introduce derived runtime policy and minimal operator config
notes_for_cursor: Scope limited to derived policy module + minimal wiring in trader/config and focused tests. Do not alter accounting guards or FINAL_ZOMBIE lifecycle.
